Operation 'deleteSipDispatchRule' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, not_actionable. The operation has no description and a generic summary. Added clarity about what the operation does (removes a dispatch rule), what input is required (rule ID), what is returned (deletion confirmation), and critical side effects (destructive, cannot be undone). data.description_suggestion: Deletes a SIP dispatch rule by its identifier. This operation removes the specified dispatch rule from the system, which will stop routing incoming SIP calls according to that rule's configuration. Requires the SIP dispatch rule ID in the request. Returns confirmation of deletion. This is a destructive operation that cannot be undone.
data.reasoning: The operation has no description and a generic summary. Added clarity about what the operation does (removes a dispatch rule), what input is required (rule ID), what is returned (deletion confirmation), and critical side effects (destructive, cannot be undone). This helps AI agents understand the operation's purpose, when to use it, and its consequences.

The operation lacks a description and has a generic summary. Added context about the operation's purpose (initiating SIP call connections), what inputs are needed (room name, SIP endpoint details), what is returned (participant info), and the side effect (participant joins the room). This enables AI agents to understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.summary_suggestion: Create a SIP participant in a room
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new SIP participant and adds them to a specified room. This operation initiates a SIP call connection, allowing external SIP endpoints to join a LiveKit room as participants. Requires room name and SIP endpoint details in the request. Returns the created SIP participant information including participant ID and connection details. The participant will appear in the room and can interact with other participants.
data.reasoning: The operation lacks a description and has a generic summary. Added context about the operation's purpose (initiating SIP call connections), what inputs are needed (room name, SIP endpoint details), what is returned (participant info), and the side effect (participant joins the room). This enables AI agents to understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'createRoom' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is concise and action-oriented. Description is completely empty, which severely impacts AI agent interpretability. data.description_suggestion: Creates a new room for hosting participants and media sessions. Accepts room configuration parameters such as name, max participants, and metadata. Returns a Room object containing the room ID, creation timestamp, and current state. The room becomes immediately available for participants to join.
data.reasoning: Summary is concise and action-oriented. Description is completely empty, which severely impacts AI agent interpretability. data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all active rooms on the LiveKit server. Supports optional filtering and pagination parameters. Returns an array of Room objects containing room IDs, participant counts, creation times, and metadata. Useful for monitoring active sessions and room status.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is empty, limiting AI agent understanding of what data is returned and use cases. Added details about what the operation retrieves, pagination support, return value structure, and practical use cases for AI agents.

message: Operation 'deleteRoom' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear but description is empty. Added critical information about side effects (participant disconnection, stream termination), input requirements (room name), and the irreversible nature of the operation to help AI agents understand the consequences of using this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Deletes a room and disconnects all participants currently in that room. Requires the room name as input. All active connections and media streams in the room are terminated. Returns confirmation of successful deletion. This operation cannot be undone.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description is empty. Added critical information about side effects (participant disconnection, stream termination), input requirements (room name), and the irreversible nature of the operation to help AI agents understand the consequences of using this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all participants currently in a specified room. Requires room name as input. Returns an array of ParticipantInfo objects containing participant identity, connection state, published tracks, permissions, and metadata. Useful for monitoring active participants and their media status.
data.reasoning: Summary is action-oriented but description is empty. Added context about what data is required (room name), what is returned (ParticipantInfo array with specific fields), and practical use cases for AI agents to understand when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'getParticipant' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Summary is clear but description is empty. Added specificity about required inputs (room name and participant identity), return value structure (ParticipantInfo with specific fields), and use case context to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information about a specific participant in a room. Requires room name and participant identity as input. Returns a ParticipantInfo object containing the participant's connection state, published tracks, permissions, metadata, and session details. Use this to inspect individual participant status.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description is empty. Added specificity about required inputs (room name and participant identity), return value structure (ParticipantInfo with specific fields), and use case context to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'removeParticipant' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_side_effects. Summary is action-oriented but description is empty. Added critical side effect information (immediate disconnection, stream termination), input requirements, and clarification that removal is not permanent to help AI agents understand the operation's impact.

data.description_suggestion: Removes a participant from a room and terminates their connection. Requires room name and participant identity as input. The participant is immediately disconnected, their media streams are stopped, and they are removed from the room. Returns confirmation of successful removal. The participant can rejoin if they have valid credentials.
data.reasoning: Summary is action-oriented but description is empty. Added critical side effect information (immediate disconnection, stream termination), input requirements, and clarification that removal is not permanent to help AI agents understand the operation's impact.

message: Operation 'mutePublishedTrack' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is too vague ('Mute Track' doesn't specify it's a participant's published track). Description is empty. Improved summary to clarify scope. Added context about what gets muted (specific track), required inputs, side effects (server-side muting prevents distribution), return value, and reversibility for better AI agent understanding.

data.description_suggestion: Mutes a specific media track (audio or video) published by a participant in a room. Requires room name, participant identity, and track ID as input. The track is muted server-side, preventing it from being received by other participants. Returns confirmation of the mute action. The participant can unmute the track later.
data.reasoning: Summary is too vague ('Mute Track' doesn't specify it's a participant's published track). Description is empty. Improved summary to clarify scope. Added context about what gets muted (specific track), required inputs, side effects (server-side muting prevents distribution), return value, and reversibility for better AI agent understanding.

data.description_suggestion: Updates a participant's properties within a room, including metadata, permissions, and track subscriptions. Requires the room name and participant identity. Supports partial updates - only provided fields will be modified. Returns the updated ParticipantInfo object. Changes take effect immediately for the participant.

message: Operation 'updateSubscriptions' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, unclear_purpose, poor_ai_interpretability.
